item.title: Lifting a Livestock Trailer Back on Its Feet
item.description: A tipped livestock trailer is carefully righted and stabilized using heavy recovery equipment. What steps are needed to make this lift safe?

media:content.media:title: Lifting a Livestock Trailer Back on Its Feet
media:content.media:description: A tipped livestock trailer is carefully righted and stabilized using heavy recovery equipment. What steps are needed to make this lift safe?

item.title: Heavy Recovery: So Close, Yet So Far
item.description: A difficult recovery operation tests patience and precision as crews work through setbacks to finally move a stranded vehicle. What’s standing in the way of success?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Recovery: So Close, Yet So Far
media:content.media:description: A difficult recovery operation tests patience and precision as crews work through setbacks to finally move a stranded vehicle. What’s standing in the way of success?

item.title: Setting Up the Tow Hooks
item.description: A look at setting up tow hooks for a recovery operation, showing the equipment and preparation involved in getting ready for the pull. What would you like to see next?

media:content.media:title: Setting Up the Tow Hooks
media:content.media:description: A look at setting up tow hooks for a recovery operation, showing the equipment and preparation involved in getting ready for the pull. What would you like to see next?

item.title: When a Delivery Van Needs Recovery
item.description: A delivery van recovery operation showing the towing and rescue process, with equipment used to move the vehicle safely from the scene. A straightforward look at real-world roadside recovery work.

media:content.media:title: When a Delivery Van Needs Recovery
media:content.media:description: A delivery van recovery operation showing the towing and rescue process, with equipment used to move the vehicle safely from the scene. A straightforward look at real-world roadside recovery work.

item.title: Heavy Recovery Teamwork in Action
item.description: A challenging recovery operation highlights the coordination, skill, and teamwork needed to move heavy equipment safely and efficiently. When the job gets tough, how does the team work together to get it done?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Recovery Teamwork in Action
media:content.media:description: A challenging recovery operation highlights the coordination, skill, and teamwork needed to move heavy equipment safely and efficiently. When the job gets tough, how does the team work together to get it done?

item.title: Can We Get This Huge Truck Unstuck?
item.description: A massive truck is stranded and needs a carefully planned recovery operation to get moving again. Does the recovery team have what it takes to free it?

media:content.media:title: Can We Get This Huge Truck Unstuck?
media:content.media:description: A massive truck is stranded and needs a carefully planned recovery operation to get moving again. Does the recovery team have what it takes to free it?

item.title: Tank Turn Recovery Operation
item.description: A massive truck is stranded and needs a carefully planned recovery operation to get moving again. Does the recovery team have what it takes to free it?

media:content.media:title: Tank Turn Recovery Operation
media:content.media:description: A massive truck is stranded and needs a carefully planned recovery operation to get moving again. Does the recovery team have what it takes to free it?

item.title: Mud 1, Semi Truck 0
item.description: A semi truck loses the battle against deep mud, turning a routine drive into a recovery challenge. What went wrong, and how will they get it out?

media:content.media:title: Mud 1, Semi Truck 0
media:content.media:description: A semi truck loses the battle against deep mud, turning a routine drive into a recovery challenge. What went wrong, and how will they get it out?

item.title: The Kindness Challenge
item.description: A simple kindness challenge with a straightforward message. What small act of kindness will you share today?

media:content.media:title: The Kindness Challenge
media:content.media:description: A simple kindness challenge with a straightforward message. What small act of kindness will you share today?

item.title: Big Semi Truck Recovery Prep in Progress
item.description: A heavy recovery setup is underway for a big semi truck, with equipment and positioning being prepared for the job. The focus is on the recovery process and the steps needed before the tow begins.

media:content.media:title: Big Semi Truck Recovery Prep in Progress
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery setup is underway for a big semi truck, with equipment and positioning being prepared for the job. The focus is on the recovery process and the steps needed before the tow begins.

item.title: Baby Forklift Is Stuck
item.description: A small forklift finds itself in a situation it can’t drive out of, turning a routine day into a recovery challenge. How did it get stuck, and what’s the plan to get it out?

media:content.media:title: Baby Forklift Is Stuck
media:content.media:description: A small forklift finds itself in a situation it can’t drive out of, turning a routine day into a recovery challenge. How did it get stuck, and what’s the plan to get it out?

item.title: Pulling a Loaded Semi Out of the Mud
item.description: A fully loaded semi becomes trapped in deep mud, requiring a carefully planned recovery operation to get it moving again. What equipment and strategy will be needed to free it?

media:content.media:title: Pulling a Loaded Semi Out of the Mud
media:content.media:description: A fully loaded semi becomes trapped in deep mud, requiring a carefully planned recovery operation to get it moving again. What equipment and strategy will be needed to free it?

item.title: Carrying a Heavy Load: Game of Inches (Part 2)
item.description: The journey continues as a massive load is transported through tight spaces where precision, planning, and patience are critical. When every inch matters, what challenge comes next?

media:content.media:title: Carrying a Heavy Load: Game of Inches (Part 2)
media:content.media:description: The journey continues as a massive load is transported through tight spaces where precision, planning, and patience are critical. When every inch matters, what challenge comes next?
